SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.io

Interface Loader<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of object this loader is capable of loading
public interface Loader<T>
The Loader interface defines a contract for loading objects of a specific type from a given data source, such as a URI, using provided options. It provides a factory method and abstract methods for different loading scenarios.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isSupported(Class<?> cls, long magic, Object[] options)
    Determines whether this loader supports the given class, magic value, and options.
    T
    load(Payload payload, Object[] options)
    Loads an object of type T using the provided payload and options.
    static <T> T
    load(Class<? extends T> cls, URI uri, Object... options)
    Loads an object of the specified type using a Loader implementation that supports the provided class, URI, and options.
    static <T> Optional<T>
    tryLoad(Class<? extends T> cls, URI uri, Object... options)
    Attempts to load an object of the specified type using a Loader implementation that supports the provided class, URI, and options.

  • Method Details

    • load

      static <T> T load(Class<? extends T> cls, URI uri, Object... options) throws IOException
      Loads an object of the specified type using a Loader implementation that supports the provided class, URI, and options.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object to be loaded
      Parameters:
      cls - the class of the object to be loaded
      uri - the URI pointing to the resource to be loaded
      options - an array of options for configuring the loading process
      Returns:
      an instance of type T loaded from the provided URI and options
      Throws:
      IOException - if no suitable Loader implementation is found or an I/O error occurs during the loading process

    • tryLoad

      static <T> Optional<T> tryLoad(Class<? extends T> cls, URI uri, Object... options) throws IOException
      Attempts to load an object of the specified type using a Loader implementation that supports the provided class, URI, and options. Unlike load(Class, URI, Object...), this method does not throw an exception if no suitable Loader is found.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object to be loaded
      Parameters:
      cls - the class of the object to be loaded
      uri - the URI pointing to the resource to be loaded
      options - an array of options for configuring the loading process
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the loaded object of type T, or an empty Optional if no suitable loader is found or the loading process fails
      Throws:
      IOException - if all suitable loaders throw an I/O exception during the loading process

    • isSupported

      boolean isSupported(Class<?> cls, long magic, Object[] options)
      Determines whether this loader supports the given class, magic value, and options.
      Parameters:
      cls - the class of the object to be loaded
      magic - a magic value used for identifying the data format
      options - an array of options for configuring the loading process
      Returns:
      true if the loader supports the input combination, false otherwise

    • load

      T load(Payload payload, Object[] options) throws IOException
      Loads an object of type T using the provided payload and options.
      Parameters:
      payload - the payload containing data required for loading the object
      options - an array of objects representing additional configuration or options for the load process
      Returns:
      an instance of type T loaded from the provided payload
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during the loading process
